calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lauren Trenor for petitioner.
The Court inquired regarding the basis for extraordinaty fees. Ms. Trenor replied that the fees requested were the result of a will contest, as an objection was raised to the first submitted will, and ultimately it was agreed to proceed under the 1976 will instead by an amended petition. The Petition re Report, Fees and Final Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Continued To Dec-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Rueppel for Don Delgado. Peter Myers for Robert Shank.

Mr. Myers stated that he did not know why the 1976 will is not lodged. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to December 16, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for lodging of the 1976 will.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2013 Continued To Dec-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Continued To Nov-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Continued To Oct-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Myers for Robert Shank. John Rueppel for Don Delgado (Beneficiary).

Mr. Rueppel stated that the issue with issuance of the summons is finding addresses for the Heirs they have identified, that there has been discussion about a family tree, that the matter may be more complicated than they thought and that there are other Heirs that may require notice. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to October 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to see where things stand.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Continued To Aug-27-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
